creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 204597
Patch to bump PORTREVISION after the irssi 1.2.0 update.

Hello

The irssi-icb plugin fails to load due to ABI differences in irssi 1.2.0 and needs to be re-built.

So I have bumped the PORTREVISION for this.

It would be nice if the patch can be applied to the ports tree of FreeBSD.

Thank you
Santhosh
